sentences.arabic: الْمُوسِيقَى الْعَرَبِيَّةُ مَشْهُورَةٌ بِأَلْحَانِهَا الْجَمِيلَةِ وَآلَاتِهَا الْمُوسِيقِيَّةِ الْفَرِيدَةِ.
sentences.translation: Arapska muzika je poznata po svojim lijepim melodijama i jedinstvenim instrumentima.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic music is known for its beautiful melodies and unique musical instruments.
